title: cotoneaster nummularius subvar. lindleyi
intro: Cotoneaster nummularius subvar. lindleyi, also known as the 'Silver Pearl Cotoneaster', is a variety of flowering shrub native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, Cotoneaster nummularius subvar. lindleyi is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
